reviews.comment:
Complicado el ingreso y egreso a la estación ya que se encuentran en la intersección de dos avenidas importantes, pero la atención, limpieza y orden son excelentes.

(Translated by Google)
Getting in and out of the station is complicated because it's located at the intersection of two major avenues, but the service, cleanliness, and order are excellent.
